title: citrus × nobilis var. papillaris
intro: Citrus × nobilis var. papillaris, also known as the Meyer lemon, is a hybrid citrus plant that is a cross between a lemon (Citrus limon) and an orange (Citrus sinensis). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Citrus × nobilis var. papillaris include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be used to make a variety of herbal preparations, including teas, essential oils, and extracts, which can be consumed or used topically for therapeutic purposes.
